_comment: vert.merge range:fixed dist:0.2 on two NEARBY verts. Preop moves v0 to (0.4,-0.5,-0.5) so it's 0.1 away from v1=(0.5,-0.5,-0.5); selecting both and running vert.merge with dist:0.2 welds them. Result: 7 verts; faces using both v0 and v1 (back, bottom) lose one boundary vert each → quad → triangle.
